summary: Tested new YouTube/Instagram style dashboard feed layout. Found and fixed critical bug (handlePriceRefresh undefined). All 7 features verified working after fix.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads without errors after removing Tabs component
Shorts section shows with horizontal scrolling vertical cards (4 shorts)
Shorts cards have title/creator/views inside the card with gradient overlay
Shorts cards have price badge in top-right corner
Videos section shows with horizontal cards in grid layout (6 videos)
Videos cards have info below thumbnail (YouTube style) - title, price, creator, views/likes
Live Activity Feed visible on right side with 24h volume and active users
Short card links work correctly - navigates to /video/{video_id}
Video card links work correctly - navigates to /video/{video_id}
scrollbar-hide utility class working for horizontal scroll

bugs_fixed.fix: Changed handlePriceRefresh to manualRefresh (existing function from useDataSync hook)

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx line 482 was referencing undefined function handlePriceRefresh - fixed by using manualRefresh
New YouTube/Instagram style layout is clean and well-implemented
Shorts section uses scrollbar-hide class for clean horizontal scroll
Video cards properly display 16:9 aspect ratio thumbnails with info below
Live Activity Feed is sticky on XL screens for good UX
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo user and test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard redesign complete and working. Fixed handlePriceRefresh bug. New layout: Shorts section at top with horizontal scroll of vertical cards (9:16), Videos section below with grid of horizontal cards (16:9), Live Activity Feed on right sidebar. All navigation working.
